nodes.name: Read CSV
nodes.description: It reads in CSV files and creates a DataFrame from it.
nodes.hint: Infer the schema when a new file is selected or the file content has changed

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path
fields.description: Path of the file/directory

fields.name: separator
fields.title: Separator
fields.description: CSV Separator

fields.name: header
fields.title: Header
fields.description: Whether the file has a header row

fields.name: dropSpecialCharacterInColumnName
fields.title: Drop Special Character In ColumnName
fields.description: Whether to drop the Special Characters and Spaces in Column Name.

fields.name: mode
fields.title: Mode
fields.description: Mode for dealing with corrupt records during parsing.

fields.name: enforceSchema
fields.title: Enforce Schema
fields.description: If it is set to true, the specified or inferred schema will be forcibly applied to datasource files, and headers in CSV files will be ignored. If the option is set to false, the schema will be validated against all headers in CSV files in the case when the header option is set to true.

fields.name: addInputFileName
fields.title: Whether to Add Input File Name as Column in the Dataframe
fields.description: Add the new field:input_file_name

fields.name: encoding
fields.title: Encoding
fields.description: Decodes the CSV files by the given encoding type

fields.name: quote
fields.title: Quote
fields.description: Sets a single character used for escaping quoted values where the separator can be part of the value

fields.name: escape
fields.title: Escape
fields.description: Sets a single character used for escaping quotes inside an already quoted value.

fields.name: extraOptionsKeys
fields.title: Properties Name
fields.description: Extra options/properites available while executing in Read CSV.

fields.name: extraOptionsValues
fields.title: Properties Value
fields.description: Config Values for the Corresponding properites name

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Column Names for the CSV
fields.description: Column list from CSV

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Column Types for the CSV
fields.description: Data Type of the Output Columns

fields.name: outputColFormats
fields.title: Column Formats for the CSV
fields.description: Format of the Output Columns

fields.name: limitInputRecords
fields.title: Limit Input Records
fields.description: Maximum rows to preview in interactive/design mode (default 20). Does not affect batch execution.

fields.name: dataSampling
fields.title: Data Sampling
fields.description:
How to sample data in interactive mode:
• Random - picks random rows
• Selective - use a filter expression to choose exactly which rows to preview

fields.name: selectiveSamplingExpression
fields.title: Selective Filter Expression
fields.description: filter condition to pull specific rows in interactive mode (e.g., "Region = 'North' AND Year = 2024"). Only active when Data Sampling = Selective.

nodes.name: Join On Columns
nodes.description: Joins the incoming Dataframes on the given columns

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: joinType
fields.title: Join Type
fields.description: Type of Join

nodes.name: Data Cleansing
nodes.description: One-stop data quality powerhouse – instantly clean dozens of common messy data issues: null handling, whitespace, unwanted characters, case standardization, and more. Perfect for preparing raw source data (CSV, Excel, APIs, logs) before analytics, modeling, or reporting.

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: inputCols
fields.title: Select Columns
fields.description: Columns you want to clean. Leave empty to apply settings globally where it makes sense (e.g., trim whitespace on all string columns).

fields.name: removeNullRows
fields.title: Remove Null Rows
fields.description: Drop entire rows that contain nulls in the selected columns (or any column if none selected). Great for strict data quality requirements.

fields.name: removeNullColumns
fields.title: Remove Null Columns
fields.description: Drop entire columns that are completely null/empty. Useful after Union when some sources don’t have certain fields.

fields.name: replaceWithBlanks
fields.title: Replace Nulls To Blank (String fields)
fields.description: Replace nulls in string columns with empty string '' instead of literal 'null'. Makes downstream joins and reports look clean.

fields.name: replaceWithZero
fields.title: Replace Nulls To 0 (Numeric fields)
fields.description: Replace nulls in numeric columns with 0. Essential for aggregations (sum, avg) so nulls don’t skew results.

fields.name: trimWhitespace
fields.title: Trim Leading/Trailing Whitespace
fields.description: Remove spaces before/after text (e.g., ' John ' To 'John'). The #1 most common data issue!

fields.name: removeTabsLineBreaks
fields.title: Remove Tabs, Line Breaks & Duplicate Spaces
fields.description: Clean up copy-paste mess: replaces \t, \n, \r and multiple spaces with single space.

fields.name: allWhiteSpace
fields.title: All Whitespace Characters
fields.description: Remove every kind of whitespace (including non-breaking spaces).

fields.name: letters
fields.title: Letters (A-Z, a-z)
fields.description: Strip all letters - useful for extracting numbers from mixed fields.

fields.name: lettersExceptions
fields.title: Letters Exceptions
fields.description: Comma-separated letters to KEEP (e.g., 'A,E,I,O,U' to keep vowels).

fields.name: numbers
fields.title: Numbers (0-9)
fields.description: Strip all digits - perfect for cleaning names that contain numbers.

fields.name: numbersExceptions
fields.title: Numbers Exceptions
fields.description: Digits to KEEP (e.g., '123' to preserve house numbers).

fields.name: punctuationExceptions
fields.title: Punctuation Exceptions
fields.description: Symbols to KEEP (e.g., '.,-' for decimal numbers and names like O'Connor).

fields.name: modifyCase
fields.title: Modify Case
fields.description:
Standardize text case:
• Upper case To JOHN DOE
• Lower Case To john doe
• Title Case To John Doe
• Default To no change

nodes.name: Split
nodes.description: This node splits the incoming DataFrame into 2. It takes in the fraction to use in splitting the data. For example, if the fraction is .7, it would split the data into 2 DataFrames, one containing 70% of the rows(passed from lower edge id to next node) and the other containing the remaining 30%(passed from higher edge id to next node).

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: fraction1
fields.title: Fraction 1
fields.description: Fraction to be used for Splitting the DataFrame into two. The first DataFrame would go to the lower edge output. The other would go to the higher edge output.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Random number for Reproducibility

nodes.name: H2O ML Model Save
nodes.description: Saves an H2O MOJO ML model at the specified path.

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path
fields.description: Path for saving the H2O MOJO

fields.name: fixedPath
fields.title: Static path
fields.description: Set this to true if you want model to be saved in a static path. It will overwrite the model in the directory specified.

nodes.name: H2O Generalized Linear Models
nodes.description: Generalized Linear Models (GLM) estimate regression models for outcomes following exponential distributions

fields.name: storageLevel
fields.title: Output Storage Level
fields.description: Storage Level of the Output Datasets of this Node

fields.name: isResponseIsCategorical
fields.title: Is Response Column Categorical
fields.description: Set to 'true' for Classification (categorical target) or 'false' for Regression (numeric target).

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: The target column to be predicted.

fields.name: featuresCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: The set of predictor columns used to train the model.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric or String columns that should be treated as categorical factors/enums.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Fraction of data used for training (e.g., 0.8 for 80%).

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: balanceClasses
fields.title: Balance Classes
fields.description: Enable to oversample minority classes to balance class distribution (recommended for imbalanced data).

fields.name: nfolds
fields.title: Number of Folds
fields.description: Folds for cross-validation. Set to 0 to disable, or >= 2 to enable.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of iterations allowed for the solver.

fields.name: theta
fields.title: Theta
fields.description: Theta parameter for Negative Binomial regression.

fields.name: solver
fields.title: Solver
fields.description: Optimization algorithm to use. IRLSM is recommended for most GLM problems.

fields.name: earlyStopping
fields.title: Early Stopping
fields.description: Stop training when there is no more relative improvement on training or validation metrics.

fields.name: removeCollinearCols
fields.title: Remove Collinear Columns
fields.description: If true, automatically removes linearly dependent columns to prevent solver issues.

fields.name: family
fields.title: Family
fields.description: The distribution of the response variable (e.g., binomial for binary classification).

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Const Columns
fields.description: Whether to discard columns with only one unique value.

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Enable to score the model after every iteration.

fields.name: stoppingRounds
fields.title: Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Early stopping based on convergence. 0 to disable.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: stoppingMetric
fields.title: Stopping Metric
fields.description: Metric to monitor for early stopping.

fields.name: stoppingTolerance
fields.title: Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: Relative tolerance for metric improvement.

fields.name: gainsliftBins
fields.title: Gains Lift Bins
fields.description: Number of bins for Gains/Lift table. -1 for automatic binning.

fields.name: convertUnknownCategoricalLevelsToNa
fields.title: Convert Unknown Categorical Levels to NA
fields.description: Convert new categorical levels encountered during prediction to NAs.

fields.name: standardize
fields.title: Standardize
fields.description: Highly recommended: Scale numeric columns to zero mean and unit variance.

fields.name: intercept
fields.title: Intercept
fields.description: Include a constant term (bias) in the model.

fields.name: withLeafNodeAssignments
fields.title: With Node Assignments
fields.description: Enables computation of leaf node assignments (for applicable solvers).

fields.name: withStageResults
fields.title: With Stage Results
fields.description: Enables computation of intermediate stage results.

fields.name: tweedieVariancePower
fields.title: Tweedie Variance Power
fields.description: Variance power for Tweedie regression (between 1 and 2).

fields.name: tweedieLinkPower
fields.title: Tweedie Link Power
fields.description: Link power for Tweedie regression.

fields.name: lambdaSearch
fields.title: Lambda Search
fields.description: If true, search for the optimal regularization strength (lambda).

fields.name: nlambdas
fields.title: Number of Lambdas
fields.description: Number of lambdas to test during lambda search.

fields.name: scoreIterationInterval
fields.title: Score Iteration Interval
fields.description: Score after every N iterations.

fields.name: coldStart
fields.title: Cold Start
fields.description: If true, starts training from scratch for each alpha/lambda set.

fields.name: missingValuesHandling
fields.title: Missing Values Handling
fields.description: Strategy for missing data (e.g., skip rows or impute mean).

fields.name: nonNegative
fields.title: Non Negative
fields.description: Force coefficients (excluding intercept) to be positive.

fields.name: betaEpsilon
fields.title: Beta Epsilon
fields.description: Convergence threshold for IRLSM solver.

fields.name: objectiveEpsilon
fields.title: Objective Epsilon
fields.description: Stop when objective value improvement is less than this.

fields.name: gradientEpsilon
fields.title: Gradient Epsilon
fields.description: Convergence threshold for L-BFGS solver.

fields.name: objReg
fields.title: Objective Regularizer
fields.description: Regularizer for the likelihood divider.

fields.name: link
fields.title: Link
fields.description: Link function relating the linear model to the response distribution.

fields.name: calcLike
fields.title: Calc Like
fields.description: If true, returns the likelihood function value for HGLM.

fields.name: HGLM
fields.title: HGLM
fields.description: If true, build a Hierarchical GLM model.

fields.name: prior
fields.title: Prior
fields.description: Prior probability for y==1 in logistic regression.

fields.name: lambdaMinRatio
fields.title: Lambda Min Ratio
fields.description: Ratio of lambda_max to lambda_min for lambda search.

fields.name: maxActivePredictors
fields.title: Max Active Predictors
fields.description: Limit active predictors to prevent expensive computations.

fields.name: maxAfterBalanceSize
fields.title: Max After Balance Size
fields.description: Max relative training set size after balancing. Requires balanceClasses.

fields.name: maxConfusionMatrixSize
fields.title: Max Confusion Matrix Size
fields.description: [Deprecated] Max classes for confusion matrix logs.

fields.name: computePValues
fields.title: Compute P Values
fields.description: Compute p-values (requires IRLSM solver and no regularization).

fields.name: generateScoringHistory
fields.title: Generate Scoring History
fields.description: Enable to track model convergence history (may slow down training).

fields.name: keepCrossValidationModels
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Models
fields.description: Whether to keep individual fold models in memory.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationPredictions
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Predictions
fields.description: Required to be true for building Stacked Ensembles later.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationFoldAssignment
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Fold Assignment
fields.description: Keep fold assignments for each row.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Column with observation weights (e.g., sample weights).

fields.name: offsetCol
fields.title: Offset Column
fields.description: Column added directly to the linear predictor.

fields.name: foldCol
fields.title: Fold Column
fields.description: Column containing cross-validation fold assignments.

fields.name: foldAssignment
fields.title: Fold Assignment
fields.description: CV fold logic. 'Stratified' is best for imbalanced classes.

fields.name: aucType
fields.title: AUC Type
fields.description: Calculation method for multinomial AUC.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enable to visualize predicted vs actual classes.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Chart title name.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Chart description.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label for Target.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Predicted Label Legend
fields.description: Legend label for Predicted Label.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Save Confusion Matrix Path
fields.description: File path to save the confusion matrix.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enable to display the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: ROC chart title.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: ROC chart description.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis label.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis label.

fields.name: paramKeys
fields.title: Param Name
fields.description: Select the hyperparameters to tune.

fields.name: paramValues
fields.title: Param Value
fields.description: Enter comma-separated values for the selected keys.

fields.name: gridStrategy
fields.title: Grid Search Strategy
fields.description: 'Cartesian' tests every combination. 'RandomDiscrete' stops after a specific limit.

fields.name: gridMaxModels
fields.title: Grid Max Models
fields.description: Limits total models in RandomDiscrete search.

fields.name: gridMaxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Grid Max Runtime Seconds
fields.description: Limits search time in seconds.

fields.name: gridStoppingRounds
fields.title: Grid Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stops grid search if performance doesn't improve.

fields.name: gridStoppingTolerance
fields.title: Grid Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: Minimum improvement required to continue.

fields.name: gridStoppingMetric
fields.title: Grid Stopping Metric
fields.description: Metric used for early stopping during search.

fields.name: gridParallelism
fields.title: Grid Parallelism
fields.description: Number of models to train in parallel.

fields.name: gridSelectBestModelBy
fields.title: Grid Select Best Model By
fields.description: Metric used to choose the best model.
